normRules.ruleDescription: Pass rate per course below threshold
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Flag course for content review; notify L&D manager

normRules.ruleDescription: Average score below minimum acceptable level
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Trigger course redesign review; consider re-delivery

normRules.ruleDescription: Attendance rate per course below target
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Send reminder to absentees; flag to direct manager

normRules.ruleDescription: Trainee passes with low attendance (possible policy violation)
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Flag for L&D review; verify with manager

normRules.ruleDescription: Trainee score = 0 or did not submit assessment
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Mark as Incomplete; recommend re-enrollment in next cohort
Add to "Star Learner" report section; recommend for mentorship role
Flag for 1:1 coaching; assign buddy or additional practice resource
Escalate to L&D Manager; schedule trainer coaching session

normRules.ruleDescription: Low completion rate despite high cost
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Review course necessity; consider split delivery or self-paced format

normRules.ruleDescription: Negative or zero post-training performance delta
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Audit course design and on-the-job application support

normRules.ruleDescription: Course with missing data cannot be reported
normRules.threshold: Any required field is NULL for Completed course status
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Block course from effectiveness report; flag as data incomplete

normRules.ruleDescription: Trainee marked Late treated as partial attendance
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Count as 0.5 session for attendance rate calculation
Apply consistently across all courses; document in report footnote

normRules.ruleDescription: Minimum feedback response rate for valid analysis
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Mark feedback analysis as statistically insufficient; note in report

normRules.threshold: Pass_Status = True AND Score < Pass_Threshold, OR Pass_Status = False AND Score >= Pass_Threshold
normRules.actionIfTriggered: Flag as data integrity issue; verify with trainer before report generation

templateSections.contentDescription: Total courses, total trainees, overall pass rate, overall completion rate, total training hours, total cost (scaled)
Per-course: trainee count, attendance rate, avg score, pass rate, completion rate, cost, perf delta
Outstanding trainees (score ≥ 9.0, full attendance); At-risk trainees (score < pass threshold); Trainees who passed with low attendance
Avg trainer rating per course; avg content rating per course; notable feedback themes
Per-course attendance heatmap by session; full-absent cases; late patterns
Comparison of avg score vs pass threshold; courses below NORM-01/NORM-02; ROI analysis
Quarter-over-quarter comparison (if prior quarter data available)
List of NORM violations: score inconsistencies, missing data, incomplete courses
L&D-generated recommendations based on effectiveness analysis and NORM triggers
Full attendance log, score list, feedback list (anonymized, for L&D internal use only)
